features.description: Background sessions no longer inherit ANTHROPIC_* provider env vars from the daemon-starting shell.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed background sessions inheriting another session's `ANTHROPIC_*` provider env (gateway URL, custom headers, `/model` aliases) from the shell that started the background daemon

features.description: /advisor dialog no longer pre-selects a saved advisor model blocked by the availableModels allowlist.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed the `/advisor` dialog pre-selecting a saved advisor model that is blocked by the `availableModels` allowlist

features.description: New wheelScrollAccelerationEnabled setting disables mouse-wheel scroll acceleration in fullscreen mode.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `wheelScrollAccelerationEnabled` setting to disable mouse-wheel scroll acceleration in fullscreen mode

features.description: New `enforceAvailableModels` managed setting constrains Default model to allowlist and prevents widening by user/project
features.reference_changelog_line: Added `enforceAvailableModels` managed setting — when enabled, the `availableModels` allowlist also constrains the Default model (a Default that would resolve to a disallowed model now falls back to the first allowed model), and user or project settings can no longer widen a managed `availableModels` list
